headline: Organic Rankings · brand held, commercial gap remains
standfirst: From the Semrush Organic Research export for cmsfinancial.ae. 36 keywords ranking on the AE database, 11 on US, 4 on UK. The brand term cluster (cms finance + cms) drives 99.7% of organic traffic — non-brand commercial terms are still the opportunity. The June 4 FAQ deploy is the first move to change that.
summary_lead: Brand position #1 held. 'cms finance' continues to drive 85.31% of organic traffic from #1. Commercial keyword coverage remains thin — only 2 commercial-intent terms ranking out of 36 — which is the gap the Task 18 FAQ schema and the Month-2 link-building plan are designed to close.

win_tiles.label: cms finance · brand #1
win_tiles.tip: Top brand keyword. Drives 85.31% of organic traffic from position 1. Brand search dominance is healthy but the engagement target is commercial intent.

win_tiles.label: Total AE keywords
win_tiles.tip: Keywords ranking somewhere in top 100 of UAE Google. Up from 35 to 36 — the first new entry since the Task 1–7 technical foundation deploy.

win_tiles.label: US database
win_tiles.tip: Keywords ranking in US Google. Smaller surface area than AE but indicates the brand has reach beyond home market.

win_tiles.label: Pages with FAQ in SERP
win_tiles.tip: FAQ schema deployed June 4 on 8 commercial pages but Google's 28-day reindex hasn't completed. Next measurement July 1.

win_tiles.label: Informational intent share
win_tiles.tip: Almost half of ranking keywords are informational queries. Healthy mid-funnel coverage, opportunity for transactional terms.

win_tiles.label: Transactional intent share
win_tiles.tip: Five transactional keywords ranking. The conversion-stage terms (open account, trade gold, best forex broker UAE) are the gap to close.

prose.title: What the rankings tell us.
paragraphs: The brand term works. 'cms finance' at #1 with 85.31% traffic share is a clean leading position. The brand cluster (cms + cms finance) accounts for 99.7% of all organic traffic, which is exactly the right shape for a 22-year-old broker with strong word-of-mouth in the UAE.

The non-brand gap is the engagement target. Only 2 commercial-intent keywords ranking out of 36 total. The Task 18 FAQ schema deploy on June 4 broadcasts FAQPage JSON-LD on 8 commercial pages (forex, commodities, indices, stocks, MT5, account-comparison, regulated, homepage). That makes those pages eligible for FAQ rich results, but the eligibility doesn't translate to ranking until Google reindexes — typically 28 days for schema deploys.

cmsprime.com is the closest competitor. Six common keywords, 74% competition level. The Domain Overview competitive positioning map shows cmsprime sitting at higher organic-search-traffic volume but similar keyword count — meaning their traffic-per-keyword is higher because their pages rank better. Closing that gap is what chapter 06 (Link Building) and the upcoming Tasks 9, 10, 11 (keyword research, clustering, structure plan) collectively buy.
